title: WhatsApp Onboarding
instruction_step_1: Make sure your Meta Business Account is verified. If your account isn’t verified, please verify it according to this guide
instruction_step_2: Purchase a virtual number from Pulseem.
instruction_step_3: Click on "Login With Facebook". Give Pulseem access and fill all necessary fields according to instructions.
instruction_step_4: When reaching "Add a phone number for WhatsApp" Insert your virtual number.
instruction_step_5: Copy the verification code from the incoming messages table on this page and verify the number.
instruction_step_6: Once you're done, call Pulseem Support to complete your onboarding  03-5240290 / support@pulseem.com
phoneNumberRegistered: Phone number has been registered succesfully.

metaErrorCodes.131026:
Unable to deliver message. Reasons can include: The recipient phone number is not a WhatsApp phone number.
Sending an authentication template to a WhatsApp user who has a +91 country calling code (India). Authentication templates currently cannot be sent to WhatsApp users in India.
Recipient has not accepted our new Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
Recipient using an old WhatsApp version; must use the following WhatsApp version or greater:
Android: 2.21.15.15
SMBA: 2.21.15.15
iOS: 2.21.170.4
SMBI: 2.21.170.4
KaiOS: 2.2130.10
Web: 2.2132.6
